content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_BOM_Costs
--DROP VIEW v_BOM_Costs
as
SELECT          A.[Item Number]
,               [Units per Day]
,               [Material Cost]
,               [Labor Cost]
,               [Burden Cost]
,               [Material Cost] + [Labor Cost] + [Burden Cost] as [Total Product Cost]
,               C.STRT AS [Product Structure]
FROM
  (
  SELECT        MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               CTCD as [Units per Day]
,               PIPR as [Labor Cost]
,               PIPR*.75 as [Burden Cost]
  FROM          M3.MITMAS MM
  LEFT JOIN     M3.MPDOPE MD ON MM.ITNO = MD.PRNO
  ) A

LEFT JOIN

(
  SELECT          C1.ITNO, C2.MAXDATE, C1.CSU2 AS [Material Cost]
  FROM            M3.MCHEAD C1
  INNER JOIN      
(
  SELECT        MAX(PCDT) AS MAXDATE, ITNO
  FROM          M3.MCHEAD
  GROUP BY      ITNO
) C2
ON              C1.ITNO = C2.ITNO AND C1.PCDT = C2.MAXDATE
) B             ON A.[Item Number] = B.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
  SELECT DISTINCT PRNO, STRT
  FROM    M3.MPDMAT
) C             ON A.[Item Number] = C.PRNO
WHERE C.PRNO IS NOT NULL
